economic_notes: Sk'atsin Resources Ltd. (100% interest) and Sk'atsin Resources Limited Liability Partnership (99% interest) are government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. The Partnership is engaged in resource and economic development opportunities. Band also holds minor portfolio investments in All Nations Trust Company, BC First Nations Revenue Share Limited Partnership, and BCFN GRS GP Inc.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). GBEs (Sk'atsin Resources Ltd. and Sk'atsin Resources Limited Liability Partnership) are accounted for by modified equity method and not fully consolidated. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($5,852,762) + FNHA ($629,581) + FNESC ($1,100,149) + Province of BC ($4,282,357) + CMHC ($66,239) = $11,931,088 (rounded to $11,931,128 using segmented detail). Long-term debt includes demand loans ($207,066), mortgages payable ($184,890), and promissory note payable ($2,135,389). No remuneration schedule included in the extracted text. Deferred revenue decreased by $7,500 per cash flow statement but balance not separately stated on balance sheet. Net financial assets of $22,191,877 per Statement of Change in Net Financial Assets. Band adopted new PSAS standards PS 3450, PS 3041, PS 2601, PS 1201, and PS 3280 effective April 1, 2022. Ottawa Trust Funds of $1,073,118 held in trust with Government of Canada.
